patches.hypothesis: Fixed the root cause of overfitting by addressing the lack of general handling of header formats and the absence of edge case handling. The patch now uses a more robust approach and includes more test cases to cover future edge cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the absence of a header print method in the CSVPrinter class. The test case expects the header to be printed when the printer is created, but the current implementation does not support this feature.
